label: Upper back strain without neurologic or trauma red flags
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated upper back strain.
No fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, severe pain, neurovascular compromise, infection concern, inability to use the limb, or high-risk trauma context.
Pregnancy/pediatric pathway or specialist-directed orthopedic plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, sports medicine, orthopedics, urgent care, or the ED if symptoms are not improving or your clinician told you to recheck.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports sprain/strain home-care framing and warning signs. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed upper back strain without fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports sprain/strain home-care framing and warning signs. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed upper back strain without fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, neurovascular compromise, infection, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated upper back strain
no fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, neurovascular compromise, infection, or specialist-directed plan documented
